titles.title: Walking with Jesus/Praise Ye the Lord Hallelujah

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Walking with Jesus Walking everyday, walking all the way Walking with Jesus Walking with Jesus Along

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Walking in the Sunlight Walking in the Shadow Walking everyday, Walking all the way Walking in the Sunlight Walking in the Shadow Walking with Jesus All Along

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelu Hallelu Hallelu Hallelujah Praise ye the Lord (2x)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise ye the Lord Hallelujah (3x) Praise ye the Lord
